{{Quote|That won't be a problem anymore, sir. You may deploy the strike forces at your leisure.|Tresk Ortola to Wedge Antilles during the Battle of the Maw|<ref name="Champions of the Force">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Tresk Ortola''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer who had served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

While attending the [[Academy]], he ran into a rebel sympathizer and upon graduating from the [[Academy]], joined the merchant marine with several others. While with the group, he jumped at the first chance to join the Rebellion. For several years, Ortola served as the first officer on a Rebel gunship protecting transports and participating in a number of bold actions before being promoted to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and granted command of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] ''[[NovaFlare]]'' prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

Considered bold and not above tremendous chances if he got a gut feeling, Ortola was well known for pulling off difficult maneuvers. While his service record was exemplary however, he also had a reputation for developing selective hearing or creatively interpreting his orders when he felt there was a better solution to a given situation. This weakness brought him many successes but was also a reason he still commanded an aging corvette while other Alliance veterans went on bigger and modern ships during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Ortola was in command of one of the four Corellian corvettes assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]]. He participated in the assault on the [[Maw Installation]] and were instrumental in the destruction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Metal-Crystal Phase Shifter|MCPS]] weapon which claimed one of his ship's sister craft. His own corvette was subsequently evacuated when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]] returned and attacked the ''[[Yavaris]]'' and the two remaining corvettes.
